findings.title: [P1] Republish evidence after repair QA
findings.body: The repair loop now correctly requires fresh QA, but Deliver's stated tail only pushes/re-marks the repaired head and re-watches checks. Step 3 already ran before the PR opened, so evidence from the fresh QA dispatch is never published after a check or conflict repair. The delivered PR can therefore retain evidence for the superseded head rather than the final QA-verified head. Add evidence publication for the fresh QA result before resuming the watch (and update the PR evidence links if needed).

overall_explanation: Most accepted fixes are represented correctly, including valid YAML frontmatter, use of `mergeable` with `CONFLICTING`, fresh QA in the repair path, and removal of the requested absence pin. However, the repaired flow does not publish the evidence generated by that fresh QA, so delivery can finish with evidence tied to the pre-repair head.
